ground_truth.title: Master's in Business Administration – Earn Your MBA Degree or Business Administration Masters Degree at UT San Antonio
ground_truth.main_content:
Gain the business expertise, leadership skills and strategic mindset to advance your career on your terms. The Master of Business Administration (MBA) offers flexible options: study full time, part time or online. Our online MBA offers the same quality as our in-person program, and it is the same price. An accelerated 11-month track is also available for students who want to complete their degree in less than a year. Applicants with business and non-business backgrounds are welcome to apply.

All four MBA tracks require 36 credit hours. The Full-time MBA takes 1.5 to 2 years with a minimum of 9 semester credit hours per semester. The Part-time MBA is self-paced over 2+ years. The Accelerated MBA completes in 11 months as a fixed cohort. The Online MBA is fully online and self-paced over 1-2 years.

Program concentrations available include Accounting, Business Analytics, Economics, Finance, Management, Marketing, Operations and Supply Chain Management, Project Management, and Real Estate Finance and Development.

Admission requirements include a Bachelor's Degree from an accredited institution, minimum 3.0 GPA (on a 4.0 scale), transcripts, English language proficiency (550 TOEFL Paper / 79 TOEFL Internet / 6.5 IELTS / Duolingo 100), purpose statement, resume, and 2 letters of recommendation.

Application deadlines: Spring 2026 - November 1 (International), December 12 (Domestic); Fall 2026 - June 1 (International), August 1 (Domestic).

Graduate funding opportunities include Graduate Teaching Assistantships, Graduate Research Assistantships, Graduate Administrative Assistantships, and a $1,000 Graduate Competitive Scholarship for non-resident students.
